_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Pirates look to play spoiler in Atlanta as the Braves fight to maintain their precarious grip on the final National League Wild Card spot. With the postseason race tightening, every pitch carries immense weight for an Atlanta squad desperate to avoid a collapse against a surging Pittsburgh lineup.

The reeling White Sox limp into Citizens Bank Park looking to salvage pride against a Phillies juggernaut hungry to pad their lead atop the National League. With Philadelphia firing on all cylinders, Chicago faces a brutal test of survival against a lineup capable of turning this series into a lopsided statement.

The Red Sox invade the Bronx looking to claw back into the Wild Card hunt, but they’ll have to survive a Yankees lineup desperate to reclaim the AL East lead. With the postseason race tightening, every pitch in this storied rivalry carries massive implications for October positioning.

The Orioles look to tighten their grip on the AL East as they open a pivotal series against a desperate Blue Jays squad fighting to stay relevant in the wildcard hunt. With Baltimore chasing the division crown and Toronto clinging to fading postseason hopes, every pitch tonight carries massive October implications.

The Mariners arrive in Detroit desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Tigers squad riding a late-summer surge. With Seattle’s offense under the microscope, every pitch tonight serves as a high-stakes referendum on their ability to stay relevant in the Wild Card race.

The Rays head south to loanDepot park looking to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Marlins squad playing strictly for pride. With Tampa Bay’s wild-card margin razor-thin, every pitch tonight is a must-win to keep their October dreams on life support.

The Astros look to tighten their grip on the AL West as they host an Athletics squad playing spoiler in the season’s final stretch. With Houston fighting for seeding, every win against a surging Oakland lineup is non-negotiable.

The Royals head to Minnesota clinging to a narrow wild-card lead, desperate to fend off a surging Twins squad looking to tighten the race in the AL Central. With the postseason picture narrowing, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams fighting to control their own October destiny.

The Reds and Cardinals collide in a pivotal divisional clash tonight, with both clubs desperate to gain ground in a crowded and unforgiving National League Wild Card race. Every pitch carries postseason weight as these bitter rivals battle to keep their flickering playoff aspirations alive.

The Guardians look to tighten their grip on the AL Central as they open a high-stakes series against a Rangers squad desperate to salvage their fading postseason aspirations. With Cleveland chasing home-field advantage and Texas fighting for survival, every pitch in Arlington carries massive October implications.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they roll into Coors Field, where the Rockies hope to play spoiler and derail Milwaukee’s postseason momentum. With every win crucial in the final stretch, the visitors must navigate the thin air to avoid a costly stumble against a dangerous home underdog.

The Diamondbacks look to tighten their grip on a crowded Wild Card race as they host a Nationals squad playing exclusively for the spoiler role. With every game critical in the desert, Arizona must capitalize on this favorable home stretch to keep their postseason aspirations alive.

The Freeway Series shifts to Chavez Ravine as the Angels look to play spoiler against a Dodgers squad desperate to solidify their grip on the division lead. Expect high-octane tension tonight as cross-town bragging rights collide with critical postseason positioning.

The Mets roll into Petco Park fighting to stay relevant in a crowded Wild Card race, but they’ll have to solve a surging Padres squad that has transformed into the National League’s most dangerous team. With every game carrying postseason implications, this series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for New York’s fading playoff aspirations.

The Giants and Cubs collide at Wrigley Field tonight in a high-stakes clash where both clubs must convert wins into momentum to keep their flickering postseason aspirations on life support. With the wild-card race tightening, every pitch carries the weight of a must-win scenario for two teams desperate to avoid an early October exit.
